regional_cost_note: Painters in Tauranga typically charge $40–$60/hr. Bay of Plenty's coastal environment means quality exterior paint selection (Resene or Dulux weathershield) is essential for longevity.

businesses.name: Full Effects Painting
businesses.known_for: Led by John Martin with 30+ years experience; villa renovation specialist and high-end exterior repaint expert.

businesses.name: SMARTS Painting & Building
businesses.known_for: Licensed builder and Master Painter combined; interior and exterior painting for residential and commercial clients.

businesses.name: Fresh Coats Painting
businesses.known_for: 650+ completed projects in greater Tauranga; reliable, experienced, and use only high-performance Resene and Dulux materials.

businesses.name: Elite Painting Tauranga
businesses.known_for: Founded 2018 by Chris Young with 10+ years experience; interior, exterior, and wallpaper hanging using professional-grade products.

businesses.name: Bay Painters
businesses.known_for: Mount Maunganui-based painters known for coastal exterior paint expertise and reliable turnaround times.
